description_long: This is a female adult figure with a fit build, dressed in a form-fitting sleeveless top and high-waisted pants. She wears long gloves that extend above the elbows and knee-high boots, all of which contribute to an athletic, tactical appearance. The top features a high collar and a zipper detail, while a belt accentuates the waist. Her hair is long and straight, falling past her shoulders and framing her face. The overall look is sleek and modern, suitable for an urban or action-oriented environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A fit adult woman in a sleeveless, form-fitting outfit with long gloves, knee-high boots, and long straight hair, exuding an athletic, tactical style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, facial features, and the fitted, sleeveless top with zipper and high collar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the length of the gloves, and the contour of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hair, the fitted nature of the clothing, and the belt at the waist.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, glove length, and boot details.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic sleeveless top, high-waisted fitted pants, long gloves, knee-high boots, high collar
